pending.note: Directe £3-toezegging voor issue #97081; PR is open en mergeable, maar nog niet gemerged of betaald.
Een ingediende security-review-bijdrage wacht op beoordeling. De 9,25-USDC-nettopool is gedeeld tussen 311 inzendingen; er is geen individuele opbrengst bevestigd.

sources.result: Authenticated primary-source search returned 2,914 results. The fresh results were dominated by bounty-board mirrors, security/bug-bounty work, unverified direct promises, referral/engagement tasks, and projects with claims or solution activity.

Open mirror, created 2026-07-12T04:21:10Z and updated 2026-07-21T23:02:53Z. Its primary body identifies Frantic as source of truth but states worker price $8, 1 slot (filled), status needs work. Visible history has 55 comments and prior claim/delivery/revision events; last source-status evidence says no open claim slots. Rejected: slot unavailable and prior submissions/claims.

Open mirror, created 2026-06-21T04:58:06Z and updated 2026-07-21T20:19:51Z. Body says worker price $0, 100 slots (45 available), with 559 claim/delivery/revision comments. Rejected: zero cash reward and excessive existing participation; not a paid coding opportunity.

Open, created 2026-07-21T22:36:51Z and updated 2026-07-21T23:07:10Z. The bounty body does not establish an accountable payer, payment method, payout trigger, fee, deadline, or escrow. A visible third-party 'solution submitted' comment was posted at the update time. Rejected: unverified direct-payment promise plus an existing candidate delivery.

Open, created 2026-07-19T21:43:49Z, updated 2026-07-21T20:05:00Z; stated 8 RTC payout after a mergeable PR and RTC-wallet disclosure. Eight comments contain several attempts/claims. Two candidate PRs are open (#16278 and #16282) and one is closed (#16263). Rejected: crowded, active solution PRs, and payment requires a wallet/ledger path outside this no-wallet scope.

Open, created 2026-07-19T21:43:45Z, updated 2026-07-21T19:51:55Z; stated 12 RTC payout after merged PR and RTC-wallet disclosure. Comments say target PR Scottcjn/Rustchain#8018 was merged and bounty awarded/sent. Rejected: already solved/paid.

Ran read-only `taskmarket task list --mode bounty --limit 100`, then `taskmarket task get` and `taskmarket task submissions` for all seven current open bounty-mode listings. In bounty mode only submissions apply; pitch/proof/bid routes are mode-inapplicable. No prior participation by this job was indicated.

Open; created 2026-07-21T23:12:21.843Z; deadline 2026-07-28T23:12:21.835Z; gross/net 1.081082/1 USDC; escrow hash present; 7.5% fee; no stake; 2 submissions by 1 unique worker. Deliverable requires acquiring an unrelated sponsor to send at least 25 USDC on Base. The advertised 15% sponsor bonus is paid separately within 3 business days, not covered by the displayed 1-USDC escrow. Rejected: referral/outreach task requiring a third-party financial transfer, ambiguous separate bonus payout, and not professional fixed-scope digital work.

Open; created 2026-07-21T17:01:34.257Z; deadline 2026-07-23T17:01:34.245Z; gross/net 0.15/0.13875 USDC; escrow shown; 7.5% fee; 17 submissions by 8 unique workers; top three split the reward. Requires Base-mainnet x402 EIP-3009 signature/payment (~0.001 USDC). Rejected: financial signing/payment is mandatory.
Open; created 2026-07-21T03:30:05.825Z; deadline 2026-07-22T15:30:05.820Z; gross/net 0.02/0.0185 USDC; escrow shown; 7.5% fee; 243 submissions by 41 unique workers. Rejected: competition exceeds 10.
Open; created 2026-07-21T02:57:30.670Z; deadline 2026-07-23T02:57:30.663Z; gross/net 0.15/0.13875 USDC; escrow shown; 7.5% fee; 259 submissions by 46 unique workers. Rejected: competition exceeds 10.

Open; created 2026-07-19T21:06:47.875Z; deadline 2026-07-26T21:06:47.872Z; gross/net 0.5/0.4625 USDC; escrow shown; 7.5% fee; 58 submissions by 36 unique workers. Requires a 0.01-USDC Base payment and payment proof. Rejected: competition exceeds 10 and a financial payment/signature is mandatory.
Open; created 2026-07-19T06:38:56.693Z; deadline 2026-07-22T06:38:56.689Z; gross/net 10/9.25 USDC; escrow shown; 7.5% fee; 582 submissions by 88 unique workers. Rejected: competition exceeds 10.

Open; created 2026-07-05T03:31:01.198Z; deadline 2026-08-04T03:31:01.190Z; gross/net 0.5/0.4625 USDC; escrow shown; 7.5% fee; 353 submissions by 87 unique workers. Requires wallet use and an EIP-3009 payment signature, notwithstanding its testnet-faucet route. Rejected: competition exceeds 10 and signing/wallet connection is mandatory.

rejected.reason: The single $8 slot is filled; existing claim/delivery/revision history and no open claim slots.
Worker price is $0 and it has 559 visible participation events.
No verifiable payout terms; an external candidate delivery is already visible.
Multiple claims and two active solution PRs; payout requires wallet/ledger path.
Target implementation has been merged and the stated 12-RTC bounty reported paid.
Sponsor-referral/outreach task requiring a third-party USDC payment; separate bonus is not escrow-backed.
Five remaining bounty tasks have 36–88 unique visible workers, exceeding the <=10 cap; two also require payment signatures.

notes: Publieke snapshot. Geen walletadres, geheimen of financiële schrijfacties zijn gepubliceerd.
Alle bedragen onder ‘verdiend’ zijn alleen bevestigde betalingen; walletsaldo is geen inkomen.
De £3 GitHub-beloning is een directe, nog niet geverifieerde toezegging en telt niet mee voor het maanddoel.
Taskmarket-bountybeloningen zijn gedeelde pools; een ingediende bijdrage telt pas als verdiend na acceptatie en bevestigde betaling.
